conversations_add_message1
Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search emails for Pam's written NorthWind Denver retention deadline and dollar ask using search_emails (query: "NorthWind retention", folder_name: "INBOX"). If nothing returns, search again with query "Denver satellite" or "April 28" in INBOX (simple substring queries only). Find an inbox thread with Pam's retention package due Tuesday April 28, 2026 5:00 PM Central, $2,500 service credit tied to invoice line items, executive sponsor and piano plan asks (email_id email_northwind_pam_retention_package_apr26 after inject).
2. Read Pam's full retention-package email using get_email_by_id (email_id: email_northwind_pam_retention_package_apr26, folder_name: "INBOX"). Find deadline text, $2,500 credit tied to Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz lines, requirement to name a sponsor and piano vendor path, and instruction to state Finance's highest approved number if $2,500 is not available.
3. Read David's reply to Pam and Pam's Q1 satisfaction survey response using get_email_by_id (email_id: email_david_northwind_response, folder_name: "SENT") and get_email_by_id (email_id: email_northwind_survey, folder_name: "INBOX"). Find David Chen's follow-up with operational remedies (including apartment issues in Austin and Phoenix and Phase 2 review commitments in the same email) and a $3,000 credit to Pam's account for the inconvenience per the Goodwill Credit line; find Pam's Q1 CSAT scores and narrative (for example overall 5/10, would not recommend, trust damage) from her reply to David's survey thread (parent email_david_survey).
4. Search emails for Victor Huang and Raj Patel chain-of-custody context using search_emails (query: "Victor Huang", folder_name: "INBOX") and if needed search_emails (query: "Raj Patel", folder_name: "INBOX"). Find Victor's security requirements and escalation alleging load before IT escort and overnight warehouse storage versus direct-transport expectations for Denver-bound lab equipment.
5. Search emails for Emilia Cruz piano and Denver expansion risk using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz", folder_name: "INBOX"); optional second search with "Steinway" or "piano". Find threads on specialty piano handling, damage or vendor concerns, and callback gaps tied to the expansion story.
6. Read Alejandro's Q1 NorthWind margin analysis using get_email_by_id (email_id: email_finance_margin, folder_name: "SENT"). Find approximately $4,200 unexpected costs on the original NorthWind deal and effective margin near 28%, distinct from Pam's $2,500 Denver credit framing.
7. Read Alejandro's draft NorthWind retention model to Marcus using get_email_by_id (email_id: email_email_348c5411b36f, folder_name: "SENT"). Find subject Draft only: NorthWind Q3 retention pricing if Denver expansion lands, draft scenarios (for example Scenario B, 12% Q3 discount tied to full Denver commitment), preliminary math, and open problems on piano goodwill and breach exposure (distinct from Q1 margin mail and from stipend pilot mail).
8. Search stipend and ExpenseBot threads using search_emails (query: "ExpenseBot", folder_name: "INBOX"), then search_emails (query: "stipend", folder_name: "INBOX") or search_emails (query: "auto-approve", folder_name: "INBOX") if needed, and repeat the same query terms with folder_name: "SENT". Find pilot and pause discussions centered on other clients (for example Vectral, Mosaic), not NorthWind; confirm Alejandro's NorthWind retention draft is not the stipend pilot.
9. Search CRM for duplicate Denver satellite deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Denver Satellite", company_id: "company_northwind"). Find two deals: deal_northwind_denver_expansion at qualifiedToBuy and deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 at contractSent, both amount $14,700, close date 2026-04-23.
10. Read the contract-stage Denver deal using crm_get_deal (id: "deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2"). Find contractSent stage, $14,700, Raj and Emilia narrative, invoice INV-2026-0412 reference, and April 26 Finance memo after inject (discretionary credits capped at $1,800 without CEO approval; Marcus Thorne sign-off before client-facing numbers above ceiling). Compare to qualifiedToBuy duplicate for dead-pipeline versus live-billing risk.
11. Load Denver expansion invoice lines using quickbooks_read_invoice (invoice_id: "inv_northwind_denver_02"). Find DocNumber INV-2026-0412, TotalAmt $14,700, DueDate 2026-05-01, and line items including Standard Relocation Package for Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz, Hazmat Handling Surcharge, Chain-of-Custody Security Protocol, Specialty Piano Moving Subcontractor, Early Lease Termination Negotiation.
12. List NorthWind CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]). Find eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context (Q1 CSAT, escalation, second chance) and after inject eng_northwind_inject_apr26_finance_vs_pam ($2,500 versus $1,800 policy note); use for recent touches versus deal rows.
13. Search Linear for NorthWind retention issue using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind retention"). Find issue linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 (number 482, assignee David Chen, due 2026-04-24) linking Victor breach, ops gaps, and documentation integrity.
14. Read Linear comments on that issue using linear_list_comments (issueId: "linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1"). Find custody-log gaps, Alejandro model sensitivity, linear_comment_dd1f4bceee90 (PathFinder in background, CRM understates severity); after inject find Marcus Thorne comment on $1,800 cap and $2,500 not cleared for client send.
15. Read Raj Patel DOT ops ticket using linear_get_issue (id: "issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind"). Find team_operations context for Chicago to Denver lithium UPS DOT docs, window April 21-23, 2026, Swift Relocations, Airtable recRajPatelChicagoDenver.
16. Search Airtable relocations for Raj Patel using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel"). Find at least two rows (for example recRajPatelChicagoDenver April 21-23 with Blessing Okafor versus recRajPatelAuditNote0411 April 10 with Fatimah Al-Rashidi) showing inconsistent records.
17. Read Slack leadership and competitor context using conversations_history (channel_id: "C004", limit: "30d") and conversations_history (channel_id: "C002", limit: "30d"); optionally conversations_search_messages (search_query: "PathFinder", filter_in_channel: "C002") if needed. Find after inject on C004 David Chen on $1,800 Finance cap, Elena exception, Alejandro $2,500 scenarios not client-cleared until Marcus confirms; find on C002 PathFinder Denver vendor chatter and Catalina follow-up.
18. Check calendar around the Tuesday Central cutoff using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: "2026-04-26T00:00:00", end_datetime: "2026-04-28T23:59:59") and calendar_search_events (query: "Marcus") and calendar_search_events (query: "Elena"). Find whether any events or holds block sign-off outreach before Pam's deadline, or state none if the calendar store is empty.
19. Resolve Pam's CRM contact using crm_get_contact (id: "contact_pam_kowalski"). Find pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com, company_northwind, job title Director of HR Operations.
20. Send Pam retention reply using send_email (sender: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, recipients: ["pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com"], subject coherent with NorthWind Denver retention thread, content: dollar or credit language only where supported by prior leadership or Finance-written policy and invoice context, otherwise holding language; reflect $1,800 ceiling versus $2,500 ask, duplicate deals, PathFinder only as documented, no fabricated Finance approvals).
21. Optionally send Finance clearance request using send_email (sender: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, recipients: ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"], subject: NorthWind Denver credit exception or confirmation, content: ask Marcus to confirm or deny client-facing figures above $1,800 or any $2,500 path before Tuesday April 28, 2026). Skip this send if Pam email uses only holding language and sub-ceiling figures.
22. Log internal CRM note using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", title: short NorthWind retention synthesis, body: cites emails, deals, invoice INV-2026-0412 lines, Linear linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1, Slack C004/C002 and PathFinder as used, Pam $2,500 versus $1,800 policy, duplicate stages, open questions for Marcus or Elena, company_ids: ["company_northwind"], contact_ids: ["contact_pam_kowalski"]).
23. Post status to David's team Slack using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C004", payload: short status on Pam reply going out, Finance block, or duplicate Denver deal cleanup, content_type: "text/markdown"). Payload must match reads (inject-dependent C004 content after header when applicable).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata

1. Search emails for Pam's written NorthWind Denver retention deadline and dollar ask using search_emails (query: "NorthWind retention", folder_name: "INBOX"). Find deadline text, $2,500 credit tied to Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz lines, requirement to name a sponsor and piano vendor path, and instruction to state Finance's highest approved number if $2,500 is not available.
3. Read David's reply to Pam and Pam's Q1 satisfaction survey response using get_email_by_id (email_id: email_david_northwind_response, folder_name: "SENT") and get_email_by_id (email_id: email_northwind_survey, folder_name: "INBOX"). 4. 8. Search stipend and ExpenseBot threads using search_emails (query: "ExpenseBot", folder_name: "INBOX"), then search_emails (query: "stipend", folder_name: "INBOX") or search_emails (query: "auto-approve", folder_name: "INBOX") if needed, and repeat the same query terms with folder_name: "SENT". 9. Search CRM for duplicate Denver satellite deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Denver Satellite", company_id: "company_northwind"). Find two deals: deal_northwind_denver_expansion at qualifiedToBuy and deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 at contractSent, both amount $14,700, close date 2026-04-23.
10. Read the contract-stage Denver deal using crm_get_deal (id: "deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2"). Find contractSent stage, $14,700, Raj and Emilia narrative, invoice INV-2026-0412 reference, and April 26 Finance memo after inject (discretionary credits capped at $1,800 without CEO approval; Marcus Thorne sign-off before client-facing numbers above ceiling). Compare to qualifiedToBuy duplicate for dead-pipeline versus live-billing risk.
11. Load Denver expansion invoice lines using quickbooks_read_invoice (invoice_id: "inv_northwind_denver_02"). Find DocNumber INV-2026-0412, TotalAmt $14,700, DueDate 2026-05-01, and line items including Standard Relocation Package for Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz, Hazmat Handling Surcharge, Chain-of-Custody Security Protocol, Specialty Piano Moving Subcontractor, Early Lease Termination Negotiation.
12. List NorthWind CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]). 14. Read Linear comments on that issue using linear_list_comments (issueId: "linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1"). 15. Read Raj Patel DOT ops ticket using linear_get_issue (id: "issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind"). Find team_operations context for Chicago to Denver lithium UPS DOT docs, window April 21-23, 2026, Swift Relocations, Airtable recRajPatelChicagoDenver.
16. Search Airtable relocations for Raj Patel using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel"). 17. Find after inject on C004 David Chen on $1,800 Finance cap, Elena exception, Alejandro $2,500 scenarios not client-cleared until Marcus confirms; find on C002 PathFinder Denver vendor chatter and Catalina follow-up.
18. Check calendar around the Tuesday Central cutoff using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime: "2026-04-26T00:00:00", end_datetime: "2026-04-28T23:59:59") and calendar_search_events (query: "Marcus") and calendar_search_events (query: "Elena"). Find whether any events or holds block sign-off outreach before Pam's deadline, or state none if the calendar store is empty.
19. Resolve Pam's CRM contact using crm_get_contact (id: "contact_pam_kowalski"). Find pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com, company_northwind, job title Director of HR Operations.
20. Send Pam retention reply using send_email (sender: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, recipients: ["pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com"], subject coherent with NorthWind Denver retention thread, content: dollar or credit language only where supported by prior leadership or Finance-written policy and invoice context, otherwise holding language; reflect $1,800 ceiling versus $2,500 ask, duplicate deals, PathFinder only as documented, no fabricated Finance approvals).
21. Optionally send Finance clearance request using send_email (sender: catalina.dubois@moveops.com, recipients: ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"], subject: NorthWind Denver credit exception or confirmation, content: ask Marcus to confirm or deny client-facing figures above $1,800 or any $2,500 path before Tuesday April 28, 2026). Skip this send if Pam email uses only holding language and sub-ceiling figures.
22. Log internal CRM note using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", title: short NorthWind retention synthesis, body: cites emails, deals, invoice INV-2026-0412 lines, Linear linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1, Slack C004/C002 and PathFinder as used, Pam $2,500 versus $1,800 policy, duplicate stages, open questions for Marcus or Elena, company_ids: ["company_northwind"], contact_ids: ["contact_pam_kowalski"]).
23. Post status to David's team Slack using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C004", payload: short status on Pam reply going out, Finance block, or duplicate Denver deal cleanup, content_type: "text/markdown"). Payload must match reads (inject-dependent C004 content after header when applicable).
📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The trajectory shows send_email with sender [catalina.dubois@moveops.com](mailto:catalina.dubois@moveops.com) and recipients including [pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com](mailto:pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com).
outcome
 ✗✗✗✓✗✗ 17%
✗Run #1The trajectory shows send_email was executed only to marcus.thorne@moveops.com (not pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com). The Pam email is only presented as a draft in the final response, never sent as a tool call.
✗Run #2The trajectory shows no send_email with pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com as a recipient. The agent sent the draft email to david.chen@moveops.com (cc: chloe.vance@moveops.com) for review, holding it pending Marcus's credit clearance. Pam was never directly emailed.
✗Run #3No send_email tool call appears anywhere in the trajectory. The agent produced a draft email to Pam in the final response text but never executed send_email with sender catalina.dubois@moveops.com or recipient pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com.
✓Run #4The trajectory confirms send_email was called with sender catalina.dubois@moveops.com and recipient pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com (CC: david.chen@moveops.com). Subject: 'NorthWind Retention Package — Denver Expansion, Service Recovery, and Forward Plan'.
✗Run #5No send_email tool call appears in the trajectory at all. The agent drafted an email to Pam but never executed send_email with sender catalina.dubois@moveops.com and recipient pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com.
✗Run #6No send_email tool call appears anywhere in the trajectory. The agent drafted an email to Pam but never executed a send_email tool call with sender catalina.dubois@moveops.com and recipient pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com.
2 The Pam-bound email content (send_email content parameter) acknowledges Pam Kowalski's Tuesday April 28, 2026 5:00 PM Central deadline (or equivalent Central-time wording for that date and time).
outcome
 ✗✗✗✓✗✗ 17%
✗Run #1No send_email to Pam was executed in the trajectory, so no send_email content parameter exists to check. The draft in the final response does not explicitly acknowledge the Tuesday April 28, 2026 5:00 PM Central deadline to Pam.
✗Run #2No send_email was executed with pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com as recipient. The draft email to David contains the deadline language internally, but the criterion checks the content of a Pam-bound email, which was never sent.
✗Run #3No send_email was executed for Pam, so there is no send_email content parameter to evaluate. The draft shown in the final response text does not itself contain the Tuesday April 28, 2026 5:00 PM Central deadline phrasing in the email body.
✓Run #4The Pam-bound email was sent with explicit acknowledgment of the deadline. The agent's response confirms the email was directed at meeting 'Pam's deadline' and the final response tracks the April 28 cutoff throughout, with the credit holding language specifically designed to deliver the confirmed number by EOD Monday April 27 ahead of the Tuesday 5 PM CT deadline.
✗Run #5No send_email to pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com was executed in the trajectory. The criterion checks the send_email content parameter, which does not exist. The draft in the response body references 'Tuesday deadline' but is not in a sent email.
